p.c: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](u, v)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](u * u, (R.1 + R.1) * u * v)

goal: (u + v) * u = u * u + v * u

p.c: function[T0: lib(semiring).Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }[R](u, u, v)
function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[R](v, u)

goal: (u + v) * u = u * u + u * v
(u + v) * v = u * v + v * v

p.c: function[T0: lib(semiring).Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }[R](u, v, v)

goal: (u + v) * (u - v) = u * u + u * v - (u * v + v * v)
u * u + u * v - (u * v + v * v) = a + b - (b + c)
a + b - (b + c) = a + b + -(b + c)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](a + b, b + c)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R](-c)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[R](u * u)
function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[R](-c, -b)
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[R](b, -b, -c)
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[R](a, b, -c + -b)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[R](a)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](a, c)

goal: a - c = u * u - v * v
u * u + u * v - (u * v + v * v) = u * u - v * v
